prose:
**Aniline HOMO–LUMO gap** — frontier-orbitals by DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted RIJK) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1.
Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz`, single-point (no DFT geometry optimization).
SCF converged in 9 cycles; no warnings reported.
HOMO = −5.553772 eV, LUMO = −0.2489544 eV → gap = **5.3048177 eV**.
